name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or corrections to project documentation

# Documentation Improvement

Thank you for helping improve the GHEVERHAN Commerce Platform documentation.

Please complete this template before submitting.

---

# 1. Summary

Provide a brief description of the documentation change.

Example:

- Update Checkout Blueprint
- Improve API Documentation
- Fix Typographical Errors
- Add Deployment Guide

---

# 2. Documentation Type

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Blueprint
- [ ] README
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Development Guide
- [ ] Deployment Guide
- [ ] Coding Standards
- [ ] AI Development Guide
- [ ] Repository Standards
- [ ] Other

---

# 3. Current Problem

Describe the issue with the existing documentation.

Examples:

- Missing information
- Incorrect information
- Outdated content
- Broken references
- Inconsistent terminology
- Grammar issues

---

# 4. Proposed Improvement

Describe your proposed changes.

Include:

- New content
- Updated content
- Removed content
- Structural improvements

---

# 5. Related Documents

List all related documentation.

Examples:

docs/foundation/03_TECH_STACK.md

docs/modules/17_CHECKOUT.md

docs/engineering/23_API_SPECIFICATION.md

---

# 6. Reason

Why is this documentation update necessary?

Examples:

- Improve developer experience
- Align with Blueprint
- Match implementation
- Reduce ambiguity

---

# 7. Impact

Will this affect:

- [ ] Developers
- [ ] AI Assistants
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Business Workflow
- [ ] API
- [ ] Database

---

# 8. Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know?

---

# 9. Checklist

- [ ] Related documents identified
- [ ] Blueprint reviewed
- [ ] Terminology consistent
- [ ] References updated
